title: NorvesEditor Bridge Common Definitions
description: Shared $defs reused by per-method and per-event payload schemas. This file defines no top-level instance shape; consumers reference its $defs by absolute $id, e.g. https://norveseditor.dev/bridge/spec/schema/common.schema.json#/$defs/logLevel. Generic protocol only: no NorvesLib-specific fields appear here.

versionString.description: Protocol or product version string in MAJOR.MINOR form.

capabilityToken.description: Namespaced capability token, e.g. runtime.control or log.stream. Same lowerCamel.member shape as method/event names.

capabilityDescriptor.description: Authoritative description of one capability the engine endpoint advertises.

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation of the capability.

engineState.description: Engine lifecycle state from the engine's own perspective. Distinct from the editor-backend-owned process state.

runtimeState.description: Runtime play/pause state reported by the engine. Runtime CONTROL methods/events (runtime.play/pause/stop, runtime.stateChanged) are specified in phase C3; this enum only types status snapshots in C2.

origin.description: Which side produced an event or error. Lifecycle events may be engine-wire or editor-backend-synthesized; see protocol-overview.md.
